extract: If you were looking for the skill in Pokémon Shuffle, see Skill (Shuffle) → Transform. For the Special Ability in Pokémon Battle Trozei, see the List of Special Abilities in Pokémon Battle Trozei. Transform (Japanese: へんしん Transform) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation I. The Ability Imposter has the same effect as Transform.
